meaning: n.暴利,不正当利益adj.牟取暴利的
examples: This has been a summer of discontent because despite government efforts, an entire coastline has been monopolised by profiteering bathing clubs.
Rent controls were introduced to prevent profiteering.
WHEN finance is not being blamed for wrecking the economy, it is being attacked for profiteering.
Some things have to be imported, however, and it is hard to prevent foreigners from profiteering.
Live 8 organiser Bob Geldof had branded the attempted sale of the free tickets as "sick profiteering".
